description: Beta patch: add architecture-guidance and deep-review workflow gates, and pin key Trellis review agents to Opus.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(workflow): Claude Code planning can ask whether architecture guidance is needed before implementation; when enabled, `trellis-improve-codebase-architecture` runs in guidance mode before `task.py start` and its output is appended to `design.md`.
- feat(workflow): if `implement.md` records `架构审查：enabled`, the review-gate order now extends beyond `trellis-code-architecture-review` into a required `trellis-improve-codebase-architecture` deep-review pass before the loop can finish.
- feat(skills): `trellis-improve-codebase-architecture` now defines dedicated guidance and deep-review modes for pre-dev architecture shaping and post-review structural audits.

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(agents): `trellis-check` and `trellis-research` now pin `model: opus` in their frontmatter so the generated Claude Code agents keep the intended review and research model tier.
notes: Run `npm install -g trellis-hermes@beta` and `trellis update` to refresh workflow, skill, and agent templates. No file migration is required.
